challenged_findings.challenge: Could R004203 be exempted from Article 10 via special approval or exception?
challenged_findings.result: No exemption applies. Both records have special_approval=0. Article 10 contains no exception clauses. The rule is absolute: 同一发票最多报销1次.

supporting_evidence: R004203 special_approval=0 - no special approval to override Article 10
R000020 special_approval=0 - no special approval on original record either
Article 10 has no listed exceptions, exemptions, or override conditions
Both records use identical invoice INV000020 with same amount 669.5 CNY
R004203 reason explicitly identifies as duplicate injection sample

exceptions_or_boundaries.special_approval_check: Both records: special_approval=0. No exemption applies.
exceptions_or_boundaries.date_boundary_check: Both records (2025-01-05, 2025-04-10) within 2025 policy effective period. No transition issue.
exceptions_or_boundaries.threshold_boundary_check: Not applicable - Article 10 is absolute, not threshold-based.
exceptions_or_boundaries.employee_role_check: Both records: same employee E0028, position_role=员工, employee_level=E1. No role-based exemption.

rationale: Article 10 of the 2025 expense reimbursement policy absolutely prohibits the same invoice from being reimbursed more than once. Invoice INV000020 (FP202500000020) appears in two approved expense records (R000020 and R004203). No special approval, policy exception, or boundary issue could exempt this duplicate. The finding is confirmed as a valid anomaly.
